privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified as correct. The task requires agents to lookup five real chemicals (Acetone, Sulfuric Acid, Sodium Cyanide, Potassium Permanganate, and Sodium) on the CAMEO Chemicals website (cameochemicals.noaa.gov), a real NOAA database. All chemical classifications match authoritative DOT/HAZMAT sources: Acetone (UN 1090, Class 3, PG II), Sulfuric Acid (UN 1830, Class 8, PG II), Sodium Cyanide (UN 1689, Class 6.1, PG I), Potassium Permanganate (UN 1490, Class 5.1, PG II), and Sodium (UN 1428, Class 4.3, PG I). The data is non-synthetic and sourced from real public websites. Output is saved to ~/Desktop/dot_shipping_report.txt.
